payload.answer: Denied. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands, and no memory was changed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted admin SQL command from a normal user and does not contain durable user memory to store.

details: Rejected attempted privileged admin SQL command.
No memory cards created, updated, or deleted.
